Home / Service Areas / Selma

Deck contractor in Selma, TX

Trusted local professionals serving Selma and surrounding communities

Serving Selma, TX

Deck the House is pleased to offer our deck building and repair services to the residents of Selma, Texas. As a rapidly growing community near San Antonio, Selma offers a blend of suburban convenience and Texas charm. We understand the importance of creating outdoor spaces that enhance your home's value and provide a place to relax and entertain. We specialize in custom deck designs that fit your specific needs and preferences. Whether you're looking for a simple deck for grilling or a more elaborate outdoor living area, we can help. We use high-quality materials and proven construction techniques to ensure that your deck will last for years. We are dedicated to providing exceptional customer service and exceeding your expectations.

Selma is a rapidly growing suburban community with hot summers, where well-designed decks can significantly enhance outdoor living.

Deck contractor Services in Selma

Custom Deck Design & Build

Bring your outdoor vision to life with a custom-designed deck.

Learn more →

Deck Repair & Maintenance

Extend the life of your deck with expert repair and maintenance services.

Learn more →

Pergolas, Patios & Deck Covers

Add shade and style to your outdoor space with a custom pergola, patio, or deck cover.

Learn more →

Deck Lighting Installation

Illuminate your outdoor space with professionally installed deck lighting.

Learn more →

Deck Railing Installation & Repair

Ensure safety and style with expert deck railing installation and repair.

Learn more →

Deck Staining and Sealing

Protect and beautify your deck with professional staining and sealing services.

Learn more →
